_comment: Rule-based pre-filter scoring config. Adjust weights here without touching scripts.

bizdeedz_keyword_match.description: At least one BizDeedz keyword matched

turea_keyword_match.description: At least one Turea keyword matched

pain_phrase_match.description: At least one pain/problem phrase matched

dual_match_bonus.description: BOTH a brand keyword AND a pain phrase matched. Highest-quality signal type — someone is describing a specific problem in brand-relevant territory.

specificity_bonus.description: A high-specificity cluster matched. These clusters only appear in content describing real operational problems, not vendor blogs or academic articles.

priority_source.description: Signal came from a priority subreddit or high-priority RSS feed

high_engagement.description: Reddit post has above-threshold upvotes or comment count — indicates resonance with others in the community

_scoring_examples.excellent_signal: bankruptcy intake + pain phrase + dual_match_bonus + priority source + specificity_bonus = 2+2+1+1+1 = 7
_scoring_examples.borderline: broad keyword only + RSS = 2+1 = 3 (FAILS — threshold is 4)

ai_score_labels.2: Weak signal - topic adjacent but no clear pain or opportunity
ai_score_labels.3: Moderate - relevant topic but no specific problem or action
ai_score_labels.4: Strong signal - specific pain, trend, or opportunity with clear relevance to BizDeedz or Turea
ai_score_labels.5: High-value - practitioner describing a specific operational failure, career friction, or market gap that directly maps to an offer or content angle
